name: BMI Calculator
desc: Calculate your BMI and find out if your weight is healthy for your height.
seo_title: BMI Calculator – Body Mass Index Online Free
seo_description: Use our free bmi calculator (body mass index) to quickly estimate imc, categoria based on peso_kg, height_cm, sexo. Not registration needed.
result_context: The IMC calculado indica the category of weight; a value between 18.5-25 is considered saludable to the majority of adultos.
steps: Measure your weight in kilogramos (ej: 70 kg)
Measure your height in centímetros and converts a meters (ej: 175 cm = 1.75 m)
Square the height to the square (1.75² = 3.0625)
Divide the weight between the height to the square (70 ÷ 3.0625 = 22.8)
Compare with ranges: <18.5 low weight, 18.5-25 standard, 25-30 sobrepeso, >30 obesidad
mistakes: Use height in cm without Convert a meters (gives IMC 10000× greater)
Not considering that IMC not distingue músculo of grasa (atletas salen as sobrepeso)
Apply ranges adultos a niños or adolescents (usan percentiles per edad)
